title: Billing
heading: Billing
subtitle: Subscription, usage, and invoices

loadError.title: Unable to load billing
loadError.body: Stripe billing data is currently unavailable.

notConfigured.title: Subscriptions are not available
notConfigured.body: Stripe is not connected for this environment.

portalError: Unable to open the billing portal.

usage.title: Usage overview
usage.description: Plan account resets each billing cycle; reward account carries over. Usage spends plan first.
usage.splitBody: Analyses spend the plan account first, then the reward account.
usage.periodHelp: From your subscription. Unused points clear at cycle end.
usage.periodHelpDated: From your subscription. Unused points clear by {{date}}.
usage.bonusHelp: Signup, referral, and admin grants. Long-lived across cycles.
usage.emptyBody: Balances appear after your account is synced.

subscription.title: Current subscription
subscription.cancelNote: After cancel-at-period-end, plan points remain usable until the cycle ends. Then billing stops, unused plan points clear, and reward points stay.
subscription.canceledNote: Subscription canceled. Plan points remain usable until the cycle ends. Then billing stops, unused plan points clear, and reward points stay.
subscription.noSubBody: Choose a plan below to subscribe. You can also run analyses with signup or other reward points.

guide.title: How credits work
guide.intro: Subscriptions grant plan points each cycle; rewards accumulate separately.

dualBalance.title: Dual balance
dualBalance.body: Available total = plan points + reward points.

spendOrder.title: Spend order
spendOrder.body: Analyses deduct plan points first, then reward points.

cycle.title: Renewal cycle
cycle.body: On successful renewal, unused plan points clear and the new cycle grant is issued. Rewards are unchanged.

upgradeDowngrade.title: Upgrades and downgrades
upgradeDowngrade.body: Upgrades grant the plan-point difference immediately. Downgrades take effect on the next billing cycle.

cancel.title: Cancellation
cancel.body: Usually cancel-at-period-end: keep the current cycle, then stop renewing and clear leftover plan points.

refund.title: Refunds and disputes
refund.body: Only unused plan points are clawed back in proportion. Spent points and rewards are not taken.

plans.title: Available plans
plans.descriptionWithSubscription: Upgrade to a higher plan or downgrade to a lower one. Confirmation is hosted by Stripe.
plans.emptyBody: No active recurring prices are available.

ledger.title: Credit activity
ledger.emptyBody: Grants and analysis usage in the current billing cycle appear here.
